root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control )as member_group_control, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card)as id_card, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , 1 ) as address_line1, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , 2 ) as address_line2, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , 3 ) as address_line3, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , 4 ) as address_line4, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_id FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_member_work_info WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '000617' ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ASC, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ASC, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
